div.p: Who uses it, and every external system it touches

ul.li: Teal = the Taible system · Grey = external systems · Dark = people
Red edge = hard runtime dependency (if the GPU host is down, Taible is mute)
Dashed edge = download-time only (Hugging Face is never in the hot path)
[brackets] = where each external appears in the container (C4 L2) diagram

text.tspan: runs the STT / LLM / TTS pipeline
